items.title: [Job]: Software Engineer Intern
items.description:
### Company Name

Mercor

### Job Title

Software Engineer Intern

### Job URL

https://mercor.com/careers?ashby_jid=de3025e5-10ca-4d55-b688-eff0e647ac8d&utm_source=p0ZY1yyVMr

### Location Type

On-site

### Location(s)

San Francisco, CA

### Experience Level

New Grad (0-2 years)

### Additional Notes

- Competitive salary with H-1B sponsorship available
- $1,500/month meal stipend
- Free Equinox membership
- Comprehensive health insurance
- $20,000 relocation bonus for candidates moving to the Bay Area
- $10,000 housing bonus for living within 0.5 miles of the office

items.title: [NEW COMPANY] Circle AI
items.description:
**Company:** Circle AI
**Careers Page:** https://www.circletechnologies.ai/careers
**Company Type:** Startup
**Primary Focus:** AI-powered workflow automation, LLM agent orchestration, browser automation, and B2B system integrations
**Hiring Volume:** Medium

**Why add this company?**
Circle AI is an early-stage startup building AI-powered workflow automation solutions for businesses. They're actively hiring technical talent with expertise in modern web technologies (TypeScript/Next.js, Node.js, Python), AI/LLM orchestration, browser automation, and enterprise integrations. As a funded startup with in-person operations in San Francisco, they represent an emerging opportunity in the AI automation space with competitive compensation ($165k-$200k + equity) and significant ownership opportunities for early employees. Their focus on "forward-deployed" engineering roles and customer-facing technical work makes them particularly interesting for engineers seeking high-impact positions at the intersection of AI and enterprise software.
